en: South Korea Occupational Health and Safety Agency (KOSHA) Compliance Certificate
South Korea Occupational Health and Safety Agency (KOSHA) Compliance Certificate

Sample Document To obtain a KOSHA certificate, please access the South Korea Occupational Safety and Health Agency (KOSHA) Certification Portal. 1- Access the official KOSHA website 2- Select the "Industrial Accident Rate Certificate Issuance" menu. 3- Log in using the business registration number and the Corporate Digital Authentication Certificate. 4- Choose the application type, enter the required information, and submit the application. 5- Select the certificate timeframe to display data for the given year. (For example, 2020/1/1-2020/12/31) 6- In the application status section, click "Download" to obtain and print the certificate.
